nodes.speaker: Narration
nodes.text: The ruined room peels away. Clean glass rises around a polished chamber. The time apparatus turns in perfect silence.

nodes.speaker: Memory
nodes.text: Calibration complete. Historical anchor selected. You were taking notes because trainees were not meant to enter.

nodes.speaker: Narration
nodes.text: Behind the observation glass, a researcher raises two fingers. The countdown display falls from five to four.

nodes.speaker: Scepticism
nodes.text: A clean memory is suspicious. Notice what is absent: no face, no date, no reason you crossed the safety line.

nodes.speaker: Logic
nodes.text: Still, the sequence establishes preparation before failure. Keep the observation; reserve the explanation.

nodes.speaker: Narration
nodes.text: The display reaches three. Blue light bends sideways. Warning lamps stain the chamber red.

nodes.speaker: Memory
nodes.text: Containment rising. Manual cutoff unanswered. Someone shouts your name, but the sound breaks before it reaches you.

nodes.speaker: Empathy
nodes.text: You ran toward the chamber because someone was trapped near the controls. Fear moved before training could stop it.

nodes.speaker: Conscience
nodes.text: Trying to help does not erase consequences. Neither does it make you responsible for every failure around you.

nodes.speaker: Logic
nodes.text: The core ruptures before transport stabilizes. That matches the outward damage observed on the device.

nodes.speaker: Narration
nodes.text: The chamber becomes a dark field of suspended fragments. A gloved hand reaches through the broken light.

nodes.speaker: Memory
nodes.text: A voice: If the anchor shifts, do not correct the outcome blindly. Find the causes. Preserve the path. Then static.

nodes.speaker: Scepticism
nodes.text: Convenient guidance from an unidentified voice. Treat it as a lead, not a command.

nodes.speaker: Player
nodes.text: The machine broke before the journey completed. That is why the room and my memory do not fit.

nodes.speaker: Logic
nodes.text: A plausible hypothesis. Now distinguish what the sequence supports from what fear merely suggests.
